howItWorks.intro: This sleep quality score calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Sleep Score
rules.formula: Score = Duration + Latency + Wakeup + Restedness points
rules.explanation: Composite score from four sleep quality components.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Falling asleep in under 20 min, sleeping 7-9 hours, waking 0-1 times.
Consistent schedule, cool dark room, no screens 1hr before bed.

howWeCalculate.intro: This sleep quality score calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
